name: BI-RADS Mammography Assessment
description: BI-RADS assessment template for mammography reporting with standardized categories

findings.technique: Digital mammography was performed with standard views.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Breast Composition
sections.content: Breast composition: [a: fatty / b: scattered density / c: heterogeneously dense / d: extremely dense]

sections.name: Finding Description
sections.content: Location: [right/left] breast, [X] o'clock position. Depth: [anterior/middle/posterior]. Associated findings: [none/skin retraction/nipple retraction/skin thickening/axillary adenopathy].

sections.name: Assessment Category
sections.content: BI-RADS Category: [0: incomplete - need additional imaging / 1: negative / 2: benign finding / 3: probably benign / 4: suspicious / 5: highly suggestive of malignancy / 6: known biopsy-proven malignancy]

sections.name: Recommendation
sections.content: Recommendation: [short-interval follow-up / additional imaging / percutaneous biopsy / surgical consultation]

author: RadReport Templates
